$comment: THEME = confetti (the flagship). Brand/accent only: the red brand and the four bold decorative hues. Neutrals (surfaces/text/borders + subtle tint-surfaces) come from the active mode via [data-mode]. Where the brand red fails contrast in a given mode, an explicit [data-theme='confetti'][data-mode='…'] override lives in tokens/exceptions/ — never edit the base value to fix one mode. Emitted under [data-theme='confetti'].
